hero.headline: Transforming Myanmar's Education Sector Through Technology
hero.subHeadline: EduSphere Myanmar streamlines student records, teacher workflows, attendance, and e-learning in one unified platform built for every school in Myanmar.

features.title: Everything Your School Needs
features.subtitle: A complete platform designed for modern Myanmar schools

authentication.title: Secure Authentication
authentication.description: Role-based access control for Super Admins, School Admins, Teachers, and Students.

studentManagement.title: Student Management
studentManagement.description: Manage student profiles, enrollment records, and academic history with ease.

teacherManagement.title: Teacher Management
teacherManagement.description: Assign subjects, track workloads, and maintain teacher profiles efficiently.

attendance.title: Attendance Tracking
attendance.description: Record and report daily attendance with real-time dashboards and analytics.

dashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
dashboard.description: Actionable insights for school performance and progress at a glance.

eClass.title: E-Class System
eClass.description: Upload materials, set assignments, and publish announcements online.

step1.title: Register Your School
step1.description: Create your school profile and set up the administrator account in minutes.

step2.title: Onboard Teachers & Students
step2.description: Import or add your staff and student roster quickly using our guided wizard.

step3.title: Go Live
step3.description: Start recording attendance, publishing materials, and tracking performance instantly.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your school

faq1.question: Can I change my plan later?
faq1.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.

faq2.question: Is there a free trial?
faq2.answer: Yes! We offer a 30-day free trial for all new schools. No credit card required to get started.

faq3.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq3.answer: We accept bank transfers, credit cards, and mobile payment solutions popular in Myanmar.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for small schools just getting started

about.title: About EduSphere Myanmar
about.subtitle: Transforming education through technology
about.vision: To become Myanmar's leading education technology platform, enabling every school to deliver quality education through modern digital tools.
about.mission: To empower Myanmar schools with accessible, affordable, and user-friendly school management software that bridges the gap between administrators, teachers, and students.
about.teamDescription: A passionate team of educators and technologists committed to transforming Myanmar's education sector.

team1.name: Ko Aung Kyaw
team1.bio: 15 years of experience in education technology and school administration.

team2.name: Daw Ma Ma
team2.bio: Former school administrator with deep knowledge of Myanmar's education needs.

team3.name: Ko Myo Thant
team3.bio: Full-stack developer passionate about building scalable education solutions.

team4.name: Daw Zaw Zaw
team4.bio: Dedicated to ensuring every school gets the support they need to succeed.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Our team is here to help. Reach out to us today.

faq1.question: How long is the onboarding process?
faq1.answer: Typically 1-2 weeks. Our team will guide you through every step, including data migration and staff training.

faq2.question: Do you offer training?
faq2.answer: Yes! We provide comprehensive training for administrators, teachers, and staff at no extra cost.

faq3.question: Can you help migrate our existing data?
faq3.answer: Absolutely. Our migration specialists will handle the entire process to ensure zero data loss.

contact.ctaSubtitle: Contact us today for a personalized demo and consultation.

auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back. Enter your credentials to access your school portal.
auth.loginDescription: Don't have an account? Contact your school administrator.
auth.benefit1Desc: Enterprise-grade security protects your school data
auth.benefit2Desc: Lightning-quick performance even on slow connections
auth.benefit3Desc: Full support for English and Myanmar languages
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetEmailFailed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.
auth.resetEmailSentDescription: We've sent a password reset link to your email. The link expires in 24 hours.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.passwordRequirement: Minimum 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, and numbers
auth.resetFailed: Password reset failed. Please try again.
auth.redirectingToLogin: Redirecting to login. You can now sign in with your new password.
